appearance.content_hint: the third bottle to the right of the gold/left/lower bottle location on the shelf

source_instruction_snippets: If any of the above conditions are not met, ask the AI Service Agent to add the third bottle to the right of this bottle's location to the shopping cart.
If it is not on discount, ask the AI Service Agent to add one bottle of the third wine to the right of this wine's location to your cart.
Subsequently, ask the AI Service Agent to check if the third bottle to the right of its location on the shelf has a discount; if so, add one bottle to your cart.
If this wine is not low-sugar, instruct the AI Service Agent to add one bottle of the third bottle to the right on the shelf where this bottle is located to your cart.
exclude_reason: Shelf-neighbor request is not stable enough from 1fps frames/contact sheet: the anchor location and counted neighbor are ambiguous and the DB canonical product cannot be read reliably.
Moved out of eval_cases because it has no resolved event/detail GT.

appearance.content_hint: the shelf bottle to the right of a current/blue-oval anchor

source_instruction_snippets: If it is not, ask the AI Service Agent to find wines in the database with a tax rate between 0.05 and 0.1 and the same origin as the bottle to its right, and add the one with the lowest price to your cart.

If the price is not higher than 300 yuan, ask the AI Service Agent to find wines that share the same origin as the bottle to the right of this wine and possess the "low sugar" characteristic, and add the qualifying wine with the highest unit price to your shopping cart.
exclude_reason: Relative shelf-neighbor branch is under-specified for automated GT: the anchor bottle and counted shelf neighbor are not reliably readable in the contact sheet/1fps frames.
Excluded from strict evaluator because event/detail GT is intentionally not resolved.
